acceptance_targets: [CH06-F001] PASS if the revised text in lines 207-233 clearly shows a legally plausible purchase path for the intoxicant and no bodega clerk is selling distilled liquor; FAIL if vodka/spirits are still purchased from a bodega or location details still contradict the handoff setup.

[CH06-F002] PASS if, after line 251, at least one new external event materially changes Marisol's available choices before the close at lines 449-453; FAIL if the section remains primarily iterative draft/delete self-looping with no new pressure variable.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised text in lines 207-233 clearly shows a legally plausible purchase path for the intoxicant and no bodega clerk is selling distilled liquor; FAIL if vodka/spirits are still purchased from a bodega or location details still contradict the handoff setup.
findings.problem: The relapse purchase is staged in a neighborhood bodega selling half-pint vodka, which breaks contemporary NYC realism and conflicts with chapter-boundary handoff continuity that expects a liquor-store purchase context. This is a canonical world-logic contradiction, not a cosmetic detail.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise the acquisition sequence at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:207, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:209, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:211, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:217 so Marisol buys from a licensed liquor store (or change the substance to a legally sold bodega item). Keep downstream relapse beats intact but align location/object specifics with the chapter handoff.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if, after line 251, at least one new external event materially changes Marisol's available choices before the close at lines 449-453; FAIL if the section remains primarily iterative draft/delete self-looping with no new pressure variable.
findings.problem: After the first-drink turning point, the chapter runs a long iterative loop of drafting/deleting messages and additional swallows without enough new external pressure, so escalation plateaus instead of compounding consequence.
findings.rewrite_direction: Compress and re-sequence the post-relapse middle in snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:273 through snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:315 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:393 through snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:416 by adding at least one concrete interruptive event (time-sensitive call consequence, missed-meeting threshold, or immediate practical fallout) that forces a fresh decision before the final unsent-thread beat.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Prioritize structural and craft blockers first: causality, chapter architecture, stakes clarity, continuity logic, and all HIGH/CRITICAL defects.
revision_pass.label: HIGH/CRITICAL structural/craft fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: When choosing between reputationally safe abstraction and specific discomfort, choose specificity. Render addiction, sexuality, deceit, class shame, and grief at lived scale. In edge cases, preserve character truth and causal accountability over reader comfort or institutional decorum.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene demands bodily, moral, or economic specificity, euphemistic phrasing is treated as a failed draft and must be rewritten with concrete stakes and observable consequence.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: high - contractions are the spoken default; full forms appear only for emphasis, ritual language, or character-specific formal posture

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate scene density and pressure modes: pair high-conflict chapters with quiet domestic or documentary chapters, vary dialogue-to-interiority ratios, and prevent identical chapter skeletons in consecutive sequence.
prose_style_profile.diction: contemporary literary diction with class-aware, borough-specific concreteness; avoid prestige-neutral workshop language
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third centered on Marisol, with rare brief distance expansions for institutional scenes
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: alternating tensile compression and reflective extension; line-level cadence should carry emotional pressure, not just information
